# Styio Handoff Index

**Purpose:** Provide the generated inventory for `docs/external/for-styio/`; external compiler knowledge and requirements live in [README.md](./README.md).

**Last updated:** 2026-04-23

> Generated by `python3 scripts/docs-index.py --write`. Edit `README.md` for scope and rules, then re-run the generator after docs-tree changes.

## Files

| Path | Entry | Summary |
|------|-------|---------|
| `Styio-External-Interface-Requirement-Spec.md` | [Styio External Interface Requirement Spec](./Styio-External-Interface-Requirement-Spec.md) | Define the published styio interfaces that pafio depends on, so the compiler team can implement them without reading pafio internals and the package-manager team can validate them through black-box gates. |
| `Styio-for-Pafio-Developers.md` | [Styio for Pafio Developers](./Styio-for-Pafio-Developers.md) | Give future pafio maintainers a migration-ready knowledge pack for the styio compiler project: what is stable, what is not, which documents matter, and which files must never become hidden dependencies. |
| `Styio-Public-Interface-Roadmap.md` | [Styio Public Interface Roadmap for Pafio](./Styio-Public-Interface-Roadmap.md) | Describe the exact compiler-facing interfaces that pafio needs from styio, so future pafio maintainers know what to request, test, and vendor without depending on compiler internals. |
